english: to dismiss / to fire (from a job) / to discharge (from hospital or military)
notes: Strong verb with irregular forms. Can mean both 'to fire/dismiss' (from a job) and 'to discharge/release' (from hospital, prison, or military service).

sentences.german: Der Chef entlässt den Mitarbeiter wegen schlechter Leistung.
sentences.english: The boss dismisses the employee due to poor performance.

sentences.german: Das Krankenhaus hat den Patienten gestern entlassen.
sentences.english: The hospital discharged the patient yesterday.

sentences.german: Er wurde aus dem Militär entlassen.
sentences.english: He was discharged from the military.
